title: hybrid.rs: start_discovery returns stale RREQ when discovery already active
notes: Fixed by changing start_discovery to return Option<Rreq> = None when discovery already active to avoid stale/duplicate RREQ broadcasts. Updated doc comment. (hybrid.rs:363)
close_reason: Implemented return of None for active discovery to prevent stale RREQ; code updated in rust/lichen-node/src/hybrid.rs
